reviews.text: We had an amazing time on the night tour with Dauner! Exploring the forest after dark was such a unique experience, and his knowledge of the local wildlife and plants made it even more special. He was able to spot and explain things we would have completely missed on our own, and we learned so much along the way.
Dauner was an incredible guide! I really enjoyed the night tour of the forest. Highly recommend 😊…

We had an absolutely wonderful experience with Still Wild Nature Nightwalk Tour in Monteverde. Our guide, Dauner, was incredibly knowledgeable, enthusiastic, and truly amazing. His passion for wildlife made the entire tour even more special. We learned so much and saw incredible nocturnal animals we would have never spotted on our own. Thank you, Dauner, for a great experience. We highly recommend this tour to anyone visiting Monteverde. 🌿🌙

Super small and pleasant group. The guide was a really cool guy — knowledgeable, relaxed, and made the whole experience even better. We saw a lot of animals, but honestly, just being in the forest at night with that atmosphere was already special enough. It felt adventurous without ever being uncomfortable. I would definitely recommend this tour to anyone visiting the area.

Excellent and friendly guide! We had a great private evening tour, spotted multiple animals. Dauner is a really passionate guide, and helps with taking photos via his telescope. Easy to arrange via WhatsApp.
